description: Run /security-audit and produce structured report of findings
goal_context: Continuous security posture -- identify any new gaps since last audit (2026-03-31)
isc: Audit report exists at memory/learning/signals/ with severity ratings | Verify: find memory/learning/signals -name '*security*' -newer orchestration/task_backlog.jsonl
No critical findings left unlogged | Verify: grep -c CRITICAL memory/learning/signals/*security* || echo 0
notes:
Seed task -- Tier 0 read-only analysis
Retry 1: ISC 0/2

description: Run /synthesize-signals to distill accumulated learning signals into synthesis doc
goal_context: Learning compounds -- signals older than 7 days without synthesis lose context and value
isc: New synthesis doc exists in memory/learning/synthesis/ | Verify: find memory/learning/synthesis -name '*.md' -newer orchestration/task_backlog.jsonl
Synthesized signals count >= 5 | Verify: grep -c 'signal' memory/learning/synthesis/*.md || echo 0

description: Audit all 39 active skills for autonomous_safe classification
goal_context: Phase 5A prerequisite -- every skill needs autonomous_safe: true/false so the dispatcher knows which skills workers can invoke
isc: Every SKILL.md in .claude/skills/ contains an autonomous_safe field | Verify: find .claude/skills -name 'SKILL.md' -exec grep -L 'autonomous_safe' {} +
Count of audited skills >= 38 | Verify: grep -rl 'autonomous_safe' .claude/skills/ | wc -l
notes: Seed task -- 5A ISC item, Tier 0 audit

description: Add autonomous_safe field to skill SKILL.md files that lack it (batch 1: a-f alphabetically)
goal_context: Phase 5A -- skills need autonomous_safe classification before dispatcher can invoke them
isc: All SKILL.md files in .claude/skills/a* through .claude/skills/f* contain autonomous_safe | Verify: find .claude/skills/a* .claude/skills/b* .claude/skills/c* .claude/skills/d* .claude/skills/e* .claude/skills/f* -name 'SKILL.md' -exec grep -L 'autonomous_safe' {} +
No SKILL.md modified outside a*-f* range | Verify: echo check-scope
notes: Seed task -- Tier 1 code change, scoped to first batch

description: Run /review-code on tools/scripts/jarvis_dispatcher.py for security and correctness
goal_context: Phase 5B -- the dispatcher is the highest-risk new component; external review catches blind spots
isc: Review report generated with severity ratings | Verify: echo review-complete
No Critical findings in review output | Verify: echo check-findings
notes: Seed task -- Tier 0 review of new dispatcher

description: Add heartbeat collector for backlog health metrics (pending count, failed count, success rate)
goal_context: Phase 5B observability -- backlog health should be visible in heartbeat without building the full dashboard
isc: backlog_health collector exists in tools/scripts/ | Verify: test -f tools/scripts/collectors/backlog_health.py
Collector reads task_backlog.jsonl and outputs metric JSON | Verify: python tools/scripts/collectors/backlog_health.py
notes: Seed task -- lightweight observability before full dashboard

description: Validate overnight_runner still works after worktree library extraction
goal_context: Regression check -- overnight_runner was refactored to use lib/worktree.py; must confirm it still creates worktrees correctly
isc: overnight_runner.py --test passes | Verify: python tools/scripts/overnight_runner.py --test
overnight_runner imports from tools.scripts.lib.worktree | Verify: grep -c 'from tools.scripts.lib.worktree' tools/scripts/overnight_runner.py

description: Run /review-code on security/validators/validate_tool_use.py after P0 additions
goal_context: P0 security -- validator changes are highest-risk; must be reviewed before first autonomous run
isc: Review report generated | Verify: echo review-complete
No Critical findings | Verify: echo check-findings

description: Create Task Scheduler wrapper for jarvis_dispatcher.py (bat file + scheduled task)
goal_context: Phase 5B -- dispatcher needs to run unattended via Task Scheduler, wrapped in self_diagnose_wrapper.py
isc: Wrapper bat file exists at tools/scripts/run_dispatcher.bat | Verify: test -f tools/scripts/run_dispatcher.bat
Bat file sets JARVIS_SESSION_TYPE=autonomous | Verify: grep -c JARVIS_SESSION_TYPE tools/scripts/run_dispatcher.bat
Bat file wraps with self_diagnose_wrapper.py | Verify: grep -c self_diagnose_wrapper tools/scripts/run_dispatcher.bat
notes:
Seed task -- infrastructure for autonomous scheduling
Auto-closed: deliverable pre-exists

description: Evaluate MCPorter for MCP to CLI bridge
goal_context: 5-pre task -- steipete/mcporter wraps MCP servers as standalone CLIs, could reduce claude -p cost for deterministic tool calls
isc: Evaluation doc exists with recommendation | Verify: test -f memory/work/mcporter/evaluation.md
Doc covers: install test, tool coverage, cost comparison | Verify: grep -c 'Recommendation' memory/work/mcporter/evaluation.md

description: Context efficiency audit -- map what each agent type loads vs needs
goal_context: 5-pre task -- minimal required context per invocation type reduces token waste and improves autonomous execution quality
isc: Audit doc exists with per-agent-type context map | Verify: test -f memory/work/context-audit/audit.md
Doc covers: sub-agent, fresh-agent, claude -p context loading | Verify: grep -c 'claude -p' memory/work/context-audit/audit.md

description: Add voice_session_count metric to heartbeat collectors
goal_context: Low priority -- track voice capture adoption for Phase 3C progress visibility
isc: voice_session_count collector exists | Verify: test -f tools/scripts/collectors/voice_session_count.py
Collector outputs valid metric JSON | Verify: python tools/scripts/collectors/voice_session_count.py
